verdict: An exceptionally well-flowing Medium chart with outstanding representation of vocal rhythms, marred only by a very minor timing drift.

issues.problem: There is a slight timing drift of about 46ms from the start (onbeat at .476s) to the end (onbeat at .430s). The track's actual tempo is closer to 120.06 BPM rather than a flat 120.00 BPM, causing the sync to feel slightly tight by the outro.
